subcodes.first_line: As regards plurality of wives, concerning which thou didst inquire, according to the explicit Text of the Divine Book marriage with two wives is permissible and is in no wise prohibited [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص تعدّد زوجات سؤال نموده بودی بنصّ کتاب الٓهی جمع بین زوجتین جائز و ابداً این ممنوع نه
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
